meaning: n.[鐢焆鑷吇鐢熺墿,闈犳棤鏈虹墿璐ㄧ敓瀛樼殑鐢熺墿
examples: The female gametophyte is reduced but larger than in angiosperms; it is not autotroph ic.
The cell lost its autotroph ic character and became dependent on added chemical energy sources.
Nitrate nitrogen removal from ground water by autotroph IC denitrification in a packed bed reactor.
